import {applyExtends as _applyExtends} from '../build/lib/utils/apply-extends.js'; import {hideBin} from '../build/lib/utils/process-argv.js'; import Parser from 'yargs-parser'; import shim from '../lib/platform-shims/esm.mjs'; const applyExtends = (config, cwd, mergeExtends) => { return _applyExtends(config, cwd, mergeExtends, shim); }; export {applyExtends, hideBin, Parser};
